channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: West Coast Eagles show resilience in second half despite heavy loss to Gold Coast Suns
item.description: The West Coast Eagles endured a tough start to the AFL season, suffering a 59-point loss to the Gold Coast Suns at People First Stadium. The Eagles struggled early, with the Suns establishing dominanc...

item.title: Arsenal Eye Premier League Title as Manchester City Slip Points
item.description: Arsenal fans are buzzing after their team opened a nine-point gap over Manchester City in the Premier League race. Mikel Arteta’s side beat Everton 2-0, thanks to teenager Max Dowman coming off the be...

item.title: Ouaddou optimistic Pirates can still challenge for title after draw with Siwelele
item.description: Orlando Pirates coach Abdeslam Ouaddou remains positive about his team’s chances of winning the league despite a disappointing 1-1 draw against Siwelele at home on Saturday. Siwelele took the lead ear...

item.title: Regional Trial Court upholds robbery conviction of two former Imus police officers
item.description: The Regional Trial Court in Laguna has affirmed the conviction of two former police officers, SM/Sgt. Daisy Diones and Pat. Rene Mendoza, for robbing a retired teacher in Imus City, Cavite, back in Au...

item.title: Debating the Case for a Public AI System in Canada
item.description: Canadian security expert Bruce Schneier and Harvard data scientist Nathan Sanders argue that Canada should develop a nationalized, publicly funded AI system to serve Canadian interests rather than rel...

item.title: Court of Appeal releases four after death sentences quashed over legal errors
item.description: In Arusha, the Court of Appeal ordered the immediate release of four people who had been sentenced to death for murdering a gold trader’s wife and stealing money and gold. The accused, Jacob Shindika,...

item.title: Michelle Pfeiffer Shares Exercise as Key to Her Long-Lasting Glow in 'The Madison'
item.description: Michelle Pfeiffer, the acclaimed Oscar-nominated actress, revealed her approach to aging gracefully in a recent interview with Fox News Digital, coinciding with her role in the new Paramount+ family d...

item.title: Middle East Conflict Highlights Shift in Global Power and US Influence
item.description: The ongoing conflict in the Middle East is reshaping the global balance of power and challenging the long-standing dominance of the United States. Historically, the US has acted as a global enforcer o...

item.title: Quebec Maple Syrup Producers Increase Automation and Expand Production to Meet Growing Demand
item.description: Quebec's maple syrup industry is undergoing significant modernization as producers respond to increasing global demand. Many syrup-makers are turning to automation, implementing advanced technologies ...

item.title: Police seek public assistance to identify man found deceased in Coventry bin
item.description: Police in Coventry are appealing for assistance to identify a man discovered dead in a wheelie bin on Friday. The man, estimated to be between 40 and 50 years old, had distinctive tattoos, including a...

item.title: Nadra alerts public over fake visa portal posing as official site
item.description: The National Database and Registration Authority (Nadra) has issued a public warning about a fraudulent website designed to mimic its official visa portal. The fake site, accessible via https://www.vi...

item.title: Gilas Women continue to struggle in FIBA World Cup qualifying games
item.description: The Gilas Women’s basketball team continued to face challenges in the FIBA Women's World Cup qualifying tournament, suffering their fourth straight loss. Despite their efforts, the team struggled to s...

item.title: Prof. Abdulrahman Akinoso elected chairman of Oyo PDP faction aligned with Wike
item.description: For Ibadan, University of Ibadan scholar, Prof. Abdulrahman Akinoso, from the Department of Food Technology, don rise as chairman of one faction of Oyo State PDP wey dey follow Minister of FCT, Nyesom...

item.title: Kogi APC Women Leader Injured by Police Tear Gas During Community Incident
item.description: For Iffe Ijumu community inside Kogi State, wahala don burst as Miss Iyabo Iwamofe, local shop owner and Women Leader of APC, Iffe/Ikoyi Ward, suffer severe facial injuries after police fire tear gas ...

item.title: Racial Disparities in Missing Children Cases Lead States to Propose Ebony Alerts as Complement to Amber System
item.description: Nearly one-third of children reported missing in the United States are Black, despite Black individuals making up only about 14% of the population. This overrepresentation highlights systemic issues, ...

item.title: S. Jaishankar engages EU leaders in Brussels on trade and West Asia situation
item.description: External Affairs Minister S. Jaishankar embarked on his first foreign trip since the outbreak of the Israel-US war against Iran, travelling to Brussels, Belgium, to meet leaders of the European Union....

item.title: Hajj 2026 preparations continue as ministry assures no flight suspensions
item.description: The Ministry of Religious Affairs and Interfaith Harmony has officially dismissed media claims suggesting that Hajj flights for 2026 might be suspended due to tensions in the Middle East, terming such...

item.title: Tanzania Seeks Clear Legal Framework to Support Startups
item.description: Dar es Salaam – Stakeholders within Tanzania’s startup ecosystem are urging the government to provide a clearer legal and regulatory framework for startups as the country prepares its first national s...

item.title: Bobi Wine flees Uganda citing military hunt after disputed election
item.description: Ugandan opposition leader Bobi Wine has announced that he has fled the country, saying he is escaping a military search mounted against him after a heavily disputed presidential election held on Janua...

item.title: Government to continue flood control investigation despite ICI ending operations
item.description: Malacañang clarified that the government will maintain its investigation into anomalous flood control projects even as the Independent Commission for Infrastructure (ICI) concludes its operations at t...
